name: Iso11783PDDOnDataChanged
title: Iso11783PDDOnDataChanged
syntax: void Iso11783PDDOnDataChanged( dword ecuHandle, dword ddi, dword elNum, double value );
description: This function can be implemented in the CAPL program. The function is called up by the node layer if a process variable has been changed with a value command via the CAN Bus.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: Data dictionary identifier of the changed process variables

parameters.name: elementNumber
parameters.description: Element number of the changed process variables

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: New value of the process variables

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
